delivery.raw: 主に対面（全開講回数の過半数）、一部オンライン

rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary:
This course enhances students' ability to write clear, organized, and grammatically accurate English while building confidence through diverse writing tasks.
Students will also reflect on their progress using the CEFR framework to develop a deeper understanding of their writing skills.
aims: This course aims to cultivate students’ ability to craft clear, well-structured, and grammatically precise English prose. Through a diverse range of writing tasks, students will develop confidence in expressing their ideas with clarity and coherence. Additionally, by engaging with the CEFR framework, learners will be encouraged to reflect on their individual progress, fostering a deeper awareness of their evolving writing skills.
goals: Develop students' ability to write clear, organized, and grammatically accurate English.
Build confidence in expressing ideas through various writing tasks.
Foster reflection on individual progress using the CEFR framework.
textbooks: All materials developed by the instructor.
prereq: This is a required course for all Education students.
prep: This is a homework-heavy course that will require students to spend a good deal of time writing outside of class.

officeHour.name: Paula D. Fabian [Questions/Problems/Consultations]
officeHour.time: 3rd period before and after class (appointment required)

teachers: ◎ フェビアン ポーラ ダイアン

extra.text:

教員の実務経験との関連
Have worked as a teacher; teaching in kindergarten, elementary school NPO summer programs, junior & senior high school, vocational schools, cram schools, language schools & university. Before teaching, I worked for a small company in public relations/marketing & advertising. Over the years have volunteered or worked in/with NPO groups.
